_meta.description: Room layout specification for BaharequeModular viewers. Together with window-spec.json, provides all parameters needed to generate a 3D room viewer. All dimensions in mm.
_meta.depends_on: window-spec.json (glass types, jamb, reserved zones, sill detail)

panel.note: 1m (standard) and 2m (wide) panels use the same T2" frame. 2m panels: 38% less steel per m², half the connectors, half the pours. Mix both sizes in one building. Default height: 3.0m (adjustable per project).

width_2m.formwork: 2 × standard 1.22m plywood sheets side by side, or custom 2m×3m

tbar.note: T2" is the most available inch-based profile at any Colombian ferretería.

tbar_horizontal.description: 90° rotated frame for clerestory and horizontal wall panels. Same T2" profile but webs protrude LEFT/RIGHT (horizontal) instead of UP/DOWN.
tbar_horizontal.long_tbars: horizontal (top + bottom edges), no web protrusion
tbar_horizontal.short_tbars: vertical (left + right edges), webs protrude horizontally for VWC-A

VWC.name: Vertical Wall Connector
VWC.description: Double T-bar (I-shape). Two T-bars with flanges connected back-to-back, webs pointing outward. Used between floors where the upper web (ridge) provides bolt interface for the next floor's wall panels.

types.VWC-A: standard inline — everywhere except 90° corners and top ring
types.VWC-I90: T-junction — L-shaped, main arm + half perp arm
types.VWC-C: corner — two halves, 45° miter weld, L-shape from top

TWC.name: Top Wall Connector
TWC.description: Single T-bar (half of VWC). Used at the TOPMOST panel ring only — no upper floor, so no ridge needed. The lower web bolts to the panel web (same as VWC). The flange provides a flat bearing surface for the roof plate/eave beam. Clean flat top — no protruding ridge.

types.TWC-A: standard inline — replaces VWC-A at the top ring
types.TWC-I90: T-junction — replaces VWC-I90 at the top ring
types.TWC-C: corner — replaces VWC-C at the top ring

TWC.note: The flange (50mm wide for T2") sits flat on top. Roof plate beam bolts directly to this flange. No ridge = clean eave line, simpler roof connection.

vertical_zone.description: Gap between stacked panels where connectors occupy space.
vertical_zone.note: VWC (100mm) between floors. TWC (50mm) at the top ring only. The connector zone in the viewer uses VWC height for inter-floor and TWC height at the roof level.

infill.material: Same borate mortar as panels (1:4 cement:sand + 0.3% borax + 5 kg/m³ pasto estrella)
infill.method: Poured in-situ after connector bolts are installed and upper panels placed
infill.fills: 95% of connector zone volume (steel occupies only 5%)

structural_benefit.vertical_capacity: 4.2× improvement over steel-only (240 kN → 1015 kN per 1m panel)
structural_benefit.ring_beam_effect: Continuous masonry band around building perimeter — acts as viga de amarre (bond beam). Provides in-plane shear transfer for seismic resistance.
structural_benefit.monolithic_behavior: Building transitions from discrete panels with steel joints to a monolithic structure with continuous ring beams at every floor level.

construction_sequence: 3. Place upper floor panels on VWC-A ridge
5. Wet surfaces, pour borate mortar infill around connectors

issues_checked.thermal_expansion: Negligible at tropical highland 12-26°C range (steel 0.17mm/m expansion)
issues_checked.corrosion: Double protection: borate mortar pH buffer + hot-dip galvanized steel
issues_checked.load_path: Poured mortar bonds to panel mortar above and below — continuous contact
issues_checked.bolt_access: Bolts installed before filling — encased permanently (no future access needed)

infill.recommendation: HIGHLY RECOMMENDED for all seismic zones. Zero additional material cost (same mortar recipe). Transforms connection from joint to ring beam.

usage_rules.ground_to_clerestory: VWC — double T-bar, ridge receives clerestory panel bottom flange
usage_rules.clerestory_top_ring: TWC — single T-bar, flat flange for roof bearing
usage_rules.multi_storey_between_floors: VWC — ridge receives upper floor panel bottom web

foundation.description: Brick channel on flat concrete strip. Panel web slides into channel, flange rests on walls. No bolts, no DPC penetration.

concrete_strip.note: Flat top, no embedded hardware. Width increases for thicker walls.

dpc.note: Continuous sheet on concrete, under brick channel. Zero bolt holes.

channel.drainage: 25mm coarse gravel bed + 10mm weep holes every 500mm on exterior face
channel.note: Web slides in but does not reach bottom. Gravel drains any moisture to weep holes.

foundation.infill: Lime mortar around web above gravel, after panel mortar has cured
foundation.seismic_note: For 3+ stories: add stainless L-clips at quarter points for positive uplift restraint

inner_cove.description: Concave quarter-round at interior wall-wall corners. Lime-finished.

interior_wall.description: Interior partition wall. Same 156mm construction as exterior panels but lime-finished on both faces. Used for mezzanine half-walls, room dividers, bathroom walls, etc.
interior_wall.frame: Same T2" frame as exterior panels
interior_wall.connection_to_exterior: VWC-I90 at each end where it meets an exterior panel
interior_wall.connection_to_floor: Ground floor: web slides into brick channel on foundation. Upper floors: bottom flange bolted to floor slab. See foundation-spec.md.

height.note: Wall top = mezzanine floor bottom. Slab sits on T-bar top flange.

mezzanine_half_wall.use: Supports mezzanine slab edge. Double-height room sees this wall from the open side.

glass_railing.description: Tempered glass railing at mezzanine slab edge or balcony. Mounted on teak base rail bolted to slab edge.

base_rail.note: U-channel bolted to slab edge. Glass slides in and is secured with silicone + set screws.

top_rail.note: Cap rail on top of glass. Comfortable hand grip.

posts.note: Teak posts every 1m for lateral stiffness.

glass_railing.position: Flush with interior face of supporting wall below.

floor_slab.description: Guadua triple-beam ribbed slab. 150mm culms in triangle stacks (2 bottom + 1 top), wire-lashed, mortar-filled cores at ends, esterilla below, mortar flange above, terracotta tiles on top. See floor-slab-spec.md.

esterilla.note: Guadua mat — permanent formwork + ceiling finish, lime-washed below

fill_beams.note: 1 per gap between ribs, at top level

floor_slab.material: guadua triple-beam ribs + borate mortar (standard) or pozzolanic lime mortar (El Legado)
floor_slab.composite_I: 638 × 10⁶ mm⁴ per rib (T-beam with mortar flange)

edge_rules.at_exterior_walls: Rib ends bear on VWC upper flange or TWC flange. Slab edge aligns with interior wall face. Does NOT extend into round exterior corner zone.
edge_rules.at_interior_walls: Rib ends bear on T-bar flange. 90° angle — wall top meets esterilla bottom cleanly.
edge_rules.at_open_edge: Glass railing or teak balustrade mounted on slab edge.
edge_rules.at_brick_piers: Ribs bear on timber collector beam (100×150mm) spanning across pier top.

floor_slab.junction_with_wall_below: Clean 90° angle. Interior wall top meets esterilla bottom flush.

guadua_column.note: Same culm as floor ribs. Minimal visual obstruction. Recommended for open-plan spaces.

interior_wall.note: Wall IS the column. Double duty: room divider + structural support. Best for apartments.

brick_pier.note: Traditional masonry. Separate trade. Best for hacienda aesthetic.

column_support.note: For multifamily 9m width: 1 row at ~4.5m. Hacienda arcade option: columns at 3-4m with round arch panels between.

floor_slab.spec: See floor-slab-spec.md for full structural calculations and construction sequence.

colors.description: Viewer theme colors. Hex values without 0x prefix.

viewer.note: Viewer-only display parameters, not construction dimensions.

demo_4x4.name: 4×4m demo room
demo_4x4.description: Enclosed room with windows on north and west walls. Used for corner-viewer.html.

west.note: Panels 2-3 form a single 2m opening. Panel 3 is 'window_continuation' — no jamb or joint between them.

upper_level.description: Clerestory / horizontal wall band above main walls, separated by connector zone.

north.note: Two 2m-wide clerestory windows spanning full wall width. No solid panels.

corners.description: Same R=100mm round corners, spanning connector_zone + panel_height = 1100mm
